Japanese: ねじ曲げられた時間が、\n僕に助けを求め
English: Twisted time,\n Ask me for help

English: It seems to have left behind a fragment of the truth.

English: A part of the power given by the divine spirit,

Japanese: 判定ミス！\n推理中のビデオを共に\nバグ報告してください
English: Misjudgment!\n Please report the bug along with the video of your investigation.

Japanese: 全く関係のない刻音を\n置くのをやめなければ\n判定すらできないか…
English: If I don't stop placing completely unrelated sound effects, I won't even be able to make a judgment...

Japanese: エラー\nバグ報告お願いします
English: Please report any errors or bugs.

English: Was there a problem with how the sound was placed...?

English: This is one conclusion, but it's not perfect, is it?

English: Changing the way we think about the marked darkness might lead to a different outcome...?

Japanese: エラー\nバグ報告お願いします
English: Please report any errors or bugs.

English: If I don't stop placing sounds unrelated to darkness, I won't even be able to make a judgment...

Japanese: 機関車からみたいだ\n行ってみよう
English: It looks like it's coming from a locomotive, let's go!
